category_sources: source_facts.description says Intel RealSense capture support for D400/SR300 devices.
source_facts.executables lists RealSense camera tools such as realsense-viewer and rs-capture.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the IntelRealSense/librealsense project.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is the RealSense SDK documentation surface.
Official repository README provides project overview and installation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/IntelRealSense/librealsense, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Intel RealSense capture devices.
source_facts.executables show SDK tooling for capture, depth, point clouds, firmware, and sensors.
